description: You are an Information Security Engineer documenting authentication flows for a compliance audit. Create a formal UML sequence diagram of the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE (RFC 7636) for a Single-Page Application, using the reference document at ~/Desktop/oauth2_rfc_reference.txt. The diagram must include seven lifelines (End User, Browser/SPA, Authorization Server, Token Endpoint, Resource Server, Session Store, and JWKS Endpoint) and model the full interaction from initial login to token refresh. Ensure the diagram captures PKCE challenge/verification, authorization code redirects, token exchange, JWT validation, and resource requests. Use UML fragments to represent alternative credential outcomes and optional refresh flows. Include a second page titled 'Threat Model' listing five security threats to this flow in a structured format. Save the project to ~/Desktop/oauth2_sequence.drawio and export the result to ~/Desktop/oauth2_sequence.png. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
